{"id":"cf-pdv","title":"Figma illustration: comfortIllustrations — Product Page comfort cards","description":"Redesign comfort illustration SVGs (Firm, Medium, Plush) in Figma Draw. Current programmatic SVGs look flat/abstract. Follow Figma-first pipeline validated in hq-zvz2.

SCOPE: src/public/comfortIllustrations.js — 3 scenes (firm mattress, medium mattress, plush mattress)

PIPELINE:
1. Design in Figma Draw (Pencil, Brush, scatter tools)
2. Apply Figma effects (Texture, Noise, Progressive Blur)
3. Export optimized SVG -> SVGO -> tokenize colors
4. Load static SVG file (NO buildSvgContent pattern)
5. Inject via HtmlComponent

QUALITY BAR (10-point):
- Designed in Figma Draw, brush/pencil paths
- 5+ gradient stops, 15+ elements per scene
- All colors from sharedTokens (zero hardcoded hex)
- Pipeline processed (.optimized.svg, .tokenized.svg, .wix.html)
- Accessibility (aria-hidden or role=img + title)
- Visual approval against design.jpeg
